elder_mastery_scroll.title: Research the Celestisynth scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: You have been to the end of the world and come back with something the world had never seen. You are an elder now.

description: - Mastered Celestisynth processing (the pack's highest craft tier)
- Forged Celestial Netherite (synthesis of two extreme dimensions)
- Armed yourself with the pack's best equipment
- Returned to community after the adventure's end
The Elder Mastery scroll is found in End City vault rooms
or drops during advanced Celestisynth material processing.
It formalizes the transition — you have mastered what was available.
The quantum mechanism. The instant travel.
